free_text: In INDC(CCP)-171 - only title and first author.
Scattering of 9.1+-0.2-MeV neutrons by Li-7 nuclei
Metal lithium in form of cylinder (diameter is 50.mm,
Detector with stilbene crystal of 70 mm
Detector efficiency was defined by Cf-252 prompt
neutron fission spectrum measured by calibrated
in form of polyethylene sample of 15 mm diameter 60 mm
For beam attenuation and multiple scattering in sample
was calculated by Monte-Carlo method - from 5 to 8%.
Subents 002-006 were merged in Subent 002 according to
Uncertainty of separation of different groups of
neutrons from 10 % to 4 % for angles of 30 deg and
Of compiler M.M. EN in DATA block was rounded to one
Because Entry was approved at 1979, so not corrected.
